title: Real-time Fraud Detection with ML
description: A production ML pipeline that detects fraudulent transactions in real-time using anomaly detection on streaming data from Kafka.
author: Jane Smith

title: Automated Document Summarization
description: Internal tool that uses LLMs to summarize legal documents for the compliance team. Reduces review time by 60%.
author: John Doe

title: Prompt Quality Ranking Experiment
description: Experiment to rank prompts by quality using human feedback and automatic metrics. Results feed into the Prompt Library recommendation engine.
author: Alice Johnson
